narrative:
Wayne Twp township has 1,465 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.5 percentage points.
